title: Study App Check-in 学习打卡
scene: 学生向朋友展示学习打卡APP

lines.speaker: Student
lines.line: Look at my study app. I have checked in for thirty days in a row!
lines.trans: 看我的学习APP。我已经连续打卡三十天了！

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.line: That is impressive! What happens if you miss a day? Do you lose your streak?
lines.trans: 太厉害了！如果你漏了一天会怎么样？连胜纪录会断吗？

lines.speaker: Student
lines.line: Yes, the streak resets to zero. But I can use a "freeze card" to save it if I have one.
lines.trans: 是的，连胜会归零。但如果我有"冻结卡"，可以用它来保住纪录。

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.line: How do you earn those cards? I tried this app but I always forget to check in.
lines.trans: 你怎么获得那些卡片？我试过这个APP，但我总是忘记打卡。

lines.speaker: Student
lines.line: You get a freeze card every seven days. And if you study with friends, you remind each other.
lines.trans: 每七天你能获得一张冻结卡。而且如果你和朋友一起学习，可以互相提醒。

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.line: That sounds fun. Let us start a study group. We can share our daily progress.
lines.trans: 听起来很有趣。我们组个学习小组吧。可以每天分享学习进度。

lines.speaker: Student
lines.line: Great idea! I learned fifty new words this week. What about you?
lines.trans: 好主意！我这周学了五十个新单词。你呢？

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.line: I only read two chapters of my book. I need to step up my game.
lines.trans: 我只读了两章书。我得加把劲了。

lines.speaker: Student
lines.line: We can set a daily goal together. Let us aim for thirty minutes of reading every day.
lines.trans: 我们可以一起设定每日目标。目标定为每天阅读三十分钟吧。

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.line: Deal! Let me download the app and join your group right now.
lines.trans: 一言为定！我这就下载APP，加入你的小组。
